summary: Tested Fund Focus separation feature. All navigation and page structure checks passed. Fund Focus button navigates to /fund-focus, Settings button navigates to /settings. FundFocus page has all required form fields. Settings page correctly has no Fund Focus form fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fund Focus separation is complete and working. Dashboard nav has fund-thesis-btn -> /fund-focus and settings-btn -> /settings. FundFocus.jsx has all form fields (fund-name-input, fund-type-select, thesis-input, sectors-input, check-size-input, save-thesis-btn). Settings.jsx has no Fund Focus fields. Both pages have back-to-dashboard button. ProductTour overlay can block clicks - dismiss via localStorage.setItem('vc_tour_dismissed', 'true') before testing nav buttons.
